ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Activated__c = TRUE, PRIORVALUE(Activated__c) = FALSE, OR( ISBLANK(TEXT(( BillingSchedule__c ))), ISBLANK( StartDateRevRec__c ), ISBLANK(TEXT(( Term__c ))), AND( PO_Required__c = TRUE, OR( ISBLANK( PO_Reference__c ), ISBLANK( PO_Request_Date__c ) ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can't activate these items because one of these fields is empty : Billing Schedule, Term, Start Date If a PO is required on the items, the PO Reference and PO Request date must be filled
